data.body: bde5 CLAIMED. Held-out TDD: 2 happy-path (policy registered at import + sign/verify roundtrip) + 7 held-out (cross-identity reject, tamper payload/sig reject, unknown/keyless identity non-verified, verify-never-raises-on-lookup-error, trust-root-from-keys). RED confirmed (authorship module absent). Held out. Dispatching implementer.
